description: 蠶食追蹤清單 — 記錄所有被內化到 Workshop 的外部來源（代碼、論文、文章、概念）

sources.name: Crawl4AI
sources.notes: 蠶食設計模式（rate limiting, chunking, enrichment pipeline），保留核心引擎（browser automation + JS rendering）於隔離 venv ~/.venvs/crawl4ai/

extractions.source_path: crawl4ai/async_dispatcher.py
extractions.adaptation: 改為 asyncio.Lock per domain + jitter，接入 intelflow/webcrawl.py

extractions.source_path: crawl4ai/chunking_strategy.py
extractions.adaptation: 4 strategies (Regex/Fixed/Sliding/Sentence)，接入 shared/embedding.py get_embeddings_chunked()

extractions.source_path: crawl4ai/extraction_strategy.py
extractions.adaptation: EnrichmentPipeline + PatternMatchStrategy + DefaultsStrategy，接入 capture promote() 流程

extractions.source_path: crawl4ai/content_filter_strategy.py
extractions.adaptation: FilterChain + 5 filters (domain/path/extension/robots/duplicate)

extractions.source_path: crawl4ai/content_filter_strategy.py
extractions.adaptation: CompositeScorer + 4 scorers (freshness/depth/domain-authority/keyword)

extractions.source_path: crawl4ai/markdown_generation_strategy.py
extractions.adaptation: stdlib html.parser 零依賴重寫，支援 links_as_citations mode

extractions.source_path: crawl4ai/async_configs.py + CrawlerMonitor
extractions.adaptation: 3-threshold water level (low/medium/high)，generic asyncio runner

extractions.source_path: crawl4ai/crawler_strategy.py
extractions.adaptation: AdapterManifest dataclass + BaseCaptureAdapter，AD-12 架構決策

sources.name: Perplexica
sources.notes: 蠶食事件驅動架構的設計模式，非整體框架

extractions.source_path: src/lib/providers/ (focus agent pattern)
extractions.adaptation: 強化 Workshop EventBus — typed events + subscriber discovery

extractions.source_path: src/routes/api/search.ts
extractions.adaptation: 統一 SSE 格式，用於 briefing debate + intelflow streaming

extractions.source_path: src/agents/ (agent registry pattern)
extractions.adaptation: Event type auto-registration pattern

sources.name: Impeccable
sources.notes: 蠶食 AI Slop Detection 概念 + Multi-Target Transformer Pipeline 設計

extractions.pattern: AI Slop Detection (anti-pattern as first-class citizen)
extractions.source_path: concept: treating AI anti-patterns as explicit detection targets
extractions.adaptation: 整合到 frontend-design skill v2.3.0，不只告訴 AI 該做什麼，同等重視不該做什麼

extractions.source_path: concept: source/*.md → transformer per provider → dist/{provider}/
extractions.adaptation: 備用模式 — 當需要跨 AI 工具分發 skill 時參考

sources.name: StarSift: GitHub Star Inflation Detection (CMU)
sources.notes: 蠶食 star inflation 偵測方法論，強化我們評估 OSS 信譽的判斷力

extractions.source_path: Section 3: Temporal + contributor diversity + correlation analysis
extractions.adaptation: 內化為蠶食適用性判斷的「源碼品質可信」標準的具體方法

sources.name: PeonPing (Silent Window Pattern)
sources.notes: 蠶食 silent browser window 模式用於自動化場景

extractions.source_path: concept: headless browser keep-alive without focus stealing
extractions.adaptation: 融入三層防禦策略的 Layer 1 (headless) 與 Layer 2 (螢幕外)

sources.name: Amazing Marvin
sources.notes: 全盤蠶食 15 個設計模式 + 自創領航法。概念蠶食（非代碼蠶食）— 研究 Marvin 的設計哲學與機制，在 DailyOS 中重新實現。目標：首個認知預算優先的生產力平台。

extractions.pattern: Feature Toggle System (94+ strategies as independent switches)
extractions.source_path: concept: Strategy System with on/off toggles per feature
extractions.adaptation: user_toggles 表 + toggle_key CRUD，source 標記 toggle 來源 (manual/workflow/snippet/quiz)

extractions.source_path: concept: Backburner → Master → Scheduled → Today flow
extractions.adaptation: backlog_items 表 + funnel_layer 欄位，promote/demote API 逐層推進

extractions.source_path: concept: Time estimate + auto-learning from history + real-time bar
extractions.adaptation: capacity_history 表支持 dual-track (time + cognitive)，14 天滑動平均自動校準

extractions.source_path: concept: start_date/end_date (planning) ≠ do_date (scheduling)
extractions.adaptation: BacklogItem 具備 start_date, due_date, do_date 三欄位

extractions.source_path: concept: Preset workflow = method + settings + labels bundle
extractions.adaptation: workflows 表 + method_ids + toggle_overrides + snippet_ids 組合

extractions.source_path: concept: Non-exclusive, stackable feature bundles
extractions.adaptation: snippets 表 + toggle_keys + config_patch，C2 覆蓋優先級鏈

extractions.source_path: concept: RPN filter expressions for cross-cutting queries
extractions.adaptation: smart_lists 表 + RPN filter_expr engine，C5 遷移 accept_filter

extractions.source_path: concept: Plan one day at a time + evening review + carryover
extractions.adaptation: morning/evening ritual endpoints，整合 active methods 的 review_cycle config

extractions.source_path: concept: Points + Kudos + Streaks + Real-world rewards
extractions.adaptation: 跨模組成長貨幣 + 動態定價（拖延加倍）+ C6 驗證通過才加分

extractions.source_path: concept: Hover → full-screen prompts → decompose → micro-start
extractions.adaptation: 4 步驟狀態機：識別阻力→分解→環境切換→微啟動

extractions.source_path: concept: Save task as template with all properties auto-persisted
extractions.adaptation: plan_templates 表，支持從現有 daily plan 一鍵建立模板

extractions.source_path: concept: 4 quadrants = 4 smart list presets
extractions.adaptation: C5 長期遷移：靜態 categories → 動態 SmartList 查詢

extractions.source_path: concept: First-run questionnaire → recommend workflow
extractions.adaptation: C7 tag-matching：quiz 答案產生 tag set，匹配 workflow/toggle tags

extractions.source_path: concept: Workflow Builder to test templates before committing
extractions.adaptation: experiments 表，A/B 測試不同 workflow，自動比較完成率/連勝/積分

extractions.source_path: original: 雙軌容量 + 四飛行模式 + 驗證棘輪 + 黑盒子審查
extractions.adaptation: DailyOS 護城河：認知預算管理（競品未觸及維度）
